message:
feat: inline module dispatch for from-imports and Decimal type

- Add local_from_imports tracking for inline-only modules (decimal, etc.)
  This allows `from decimal import Decimal` to properly route calls
  through module dispatch instead of treating Decimal as an unknown class

- Change decimal module to inline-only (zig_import=null) since it uses
  codegen dispatch not a real Zig module

- Add runtime.Decimal type (f64-backed) for decimal arithmetic support

- Update decimal_mod to emit runtime.Decimal instead of bare Decimal

- Fix unused variable warnings in resolver.zig (debug timers)

files.patch:
@@ -275,7 +275,7 @@ pub fn createDefaultRegistry(allocator: std.mem.Allocator) !ImportRegistry {
     try registry.register("heapq", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // heapq module
     try registry.register("bisect", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // bisect module
     try registry.register("statistics", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // statistics module
-    try registry.register("decimal", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // decimal module
+    try registry.register("decimal", .zig_runtime, null, null); // decimal module - inline only (dispatch codegen)
     try registry.register("fractions", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // fractions module
     try registry.register("cmath", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // cmath module
     try registry.register("html", .zig_runtime, "std", null); // html module
